testcase.name: I18nController API error matrix > GET /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 200 with tenant overrides and request id propagation
I18nController API error matrix > GET /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 400 when tenant context is missing
I18nController API error matrix > GET /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 403 when the actor is not a member of the requested tenant
I18nController API error matrix > PUT /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 200 after updating tenant overrides
I18nController API error matrix > PUT /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 400 for malformed JSON
I18nController API error matrix > PUT /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 403 when the actor is not a member of the requested tenant
StynxI18nModule integration > resolves locale order, applies tenant overrides, renders ICU messages, and localizes errors
CatalogService.translate > returns the locale-specific message when present
CatalogService.translate > falls back to en-US when the requested locale lacks the key
CatalogService.translate > returns the key when no catalog has the message
CatalogService.translate > uses process cwd when no workspace root is configured
CatalogService.translate > merges tenant overrides over the base catalog
CatalogService.translate > ignores override entries that do not match the i18n.override.<locale>.<key> shape
CatalogService.supportedLocales > includes every locale discovered across all packages
CatalogService.supportedLocales > always includes en-US even if no catalog file provided one
CatalogService.supportedLocales > skips package entries whose i18n path is not a directory and uses the built-in default locale
CatalogService.supportedLocales > loads tenant overrides once and reuses the cache
CatalogService.supportedLocales > reads packages-web catalogs and handles null tenant settings
ErrorTranslatorService > delegates translate(key, locale, vars) to LocaleService.t
ErrorTranslatorService > passes empty vars when none provided
I18nAdminService > lists only i18n override settings for a tenant
I18nAdminService > returns no overrides when the tenant has no settings row
I18nAdminService > updates override settings and refreshes the catalog cache
I18nAdminService > creates an empty override set when update input has no catalog entries
I18nController API contract > uses request tenant context for list and update operations
I18nController API contract > uses an empty tenant id when request context has no tenant
I18nController API contract > keeps override writes outside the idempotency interceptor
LocaleService > returns the active request locale without patching context
LocaleService > uses the first supported Accept-Language entry and patches context
LocaleService > loads tenant overrides and tenant locale when the header has no supported locale
LocaleService > falls through tenant lookup when settings have no locale
LocaleService > falls back to pt-BR when supported and translates with explicit or contextual locale
LocaleService > uses contextual locale and tenant when translate is called without explicit locale
LocaleService > falls back to en-US and default translation locale when no request context is active
LocaleService > uses en-US when the catalog reports no supported locales
LocalizedErrorFilter > passes non-STYNX HTTP exceptions through unchanged
LocalizedErrorFilter > localizes STYNX errors and logs warn/error branches
LocalizedErrorFilter > rethrows unknown errors
